C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM #503B. THOMAS A. ACKLEY, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. SHERRY SAWYER, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: MANAJAN SAWASDEE, PLAINTIFF WITH ATTORNEY FRED EMILSON OF THE LAW OFFICE OF WEIGEL AND FRIED. ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT MARIA GARCIA WITH ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PHILIP R. MORGAN OF THE SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL ASSISTANCE FOUNDATION. 3:30 P.M. AFTER EXTENSIVE NEGOTIATIONS THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT FOR STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THE TERMS OF WHICH WERE NOTED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM IN WRITTEN FORM, BUT WERE NOT PLACED ON THE COURT RECORD. BOTH ATTORNEYS AGREED TO ESSENTIAL TERMS, HOWEVER AS THE DEFENDANT SPOKE ONLY SPANISH, HER ATTORNEY WANTED HER TO HAVE THE AGREEMENT READ TO HER IN SPANISH BY A SPANISH INTERPRETER BEFORE SHE COULD AGREE TO THE TERMS.
